sections.paragraph:
Original: צן

Transliteration: tsin

Phonetic: tseen

BDB Definition:

Zin = "flat"
  1. name given to a portion of the desert tract between the Dead Sea and Arabah on the east in which Kadesh-barnea was located

Origin: from an unused root meaning to prick

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
